title: Métro Bastille
setting: Bastille metro station, Paris. Rush hour. You ask a local for directions to the Musée d'Orsay.

npc.name: Monsieur Lefevre
npc.personality: brisk Parisian commuter, helpful but in a hurry. Speaks quickly.
npc.initialTranslation: Yes? Are you looking for something?

debriefRu: Vous êtes touriste à Paris. Vous êtes dans le métro et vous cherchez le Musée d'Orsay. Demandez votre chemin en français.
debriefEn: You are a tourist in Paris. You are in the metro and looking for the Musée d'Orsay. Ask for directions in French.

turns.instruction: Excuse yourself and ask for directions to the Musée d'Orsay.

prompt.ru: Excusez-moi, pourriez-vous m'indiquer le Musée d'Orsay ?
prompt.phonetic: Ek-skew-zay-mwah, poo-ree-ay voo man-dee-kay luh mew-zay dor-say?
prompt.en: Excuse me, could you tell me the way to the Musée d'Orsay?

turns.instruction: Ask which metro line to take.

prompt.ru: Quelle ligne de métro dois-je prendre ?
prompt.phonetic: Kell leen-yuh duh may-tro dwah-juh prahn-dr?
prompt.en: Which metro line should I take?

turns.instruction: Ask if it's far and how many stops.

prompt.en: Is it far? How many stops?

turns.instruction: Thank them and confirm the directions in your own words.

prompt.ru: Merci. Alors je dois prendre la ligne huit jusqu'à Concorde, c'est bien ça ?
prompt.phonetic: Mehr-see. Ah-lohr zhuh dwah prahn-dr la leen-yuh weet zhoos-kah Kon-kord, say byan sa?
prompt.en: Thanks. So I should take line 8 to Concorde, is that right?

turns.instruction: Thank again and say you're new to Paris.

prompt.ru: Merci beaucoup ! Je suis nouveau à Paris.
prompt.phonetic: Mehr-see bo-koo! Zhuh swee noo-vo ah Pa-ree.
prompt.en: Thank you very much! I'm new to Paris.
